text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's morning. Heading towards the office, I
happen to see Manhattan Cafe in the middle of
training.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gasp at what looks like waterfalls of sweat. Just
how long as she been here running?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now that I think of it, last night too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... can keep running...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I have to run... even faster... so I can... catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she's right back to training this
early despite how late she was at it last night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Not really. I do this... all the time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's quiet at night... And I can... see the other side
more clearly...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If I focus... I can see my Friend... running in front.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.
choice_data_list: I could've sworn it was only you I saw last night.
I could've sworn it was only you I saw last night.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me! Cafe, can I have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Oh, is she the friend you were talking about?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, we haven't... met before.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! Nice to meet you! To tell you the truth,
I...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I think you're amazing the way you train diligently
all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Amazing? All I'm doing is... running.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, but I still think that's amazing. So, um... if
it's fine by you, could we train together?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You want to train... with me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Sure. I don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! I'll do my best to keep up!

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd be able to keep up... but before I
knew it, I was left so far behind...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I knew... when to up my pace... from your
breathing. I must've thrown you off your rhythm...
just a little.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ah, haha... You read me like a book. You're right,
I probably messed up my pacing out of panic.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're truly amazing. Once you took the lead, it
seemed like you'd never let me have it back.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You seemed zeroed in on the path ahead.
Weren't you concerned about how close I
might've been?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: After... I passed you... my Friend was still ahead...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I see... I gotta admit, that's a little frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, never mind! Thank you for training with me
today! Let's run again some other time! See you!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What a... strange girl...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What is there to be gained... from running... with
me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm just... trying to catch up... to my Friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe gazes yearningly towards the
clearly vacant track, then breaks into a run.
